title: Beta Stairs
description: A recreation of the Beta Stairs Icon
body:
# Beta Stairs!!!!
Do you want to have the bugged icon that stairs used to have in Beta? Well this is the pack for you!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![A Screenshot of a GUI with a 9x6 grid of stairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06add3ebe5dd9f65dc651d4934b40dad63a2c29c.png)

</details>



With this Resource Pack you will be able to see what stairs used to look like in beta but in Vanilla Modern Minecraft!
Mod Support will be added in the future alongside other add-ons! If you have any suggestions please dm me on discord: miffenkop (Or put it in the issue tracker)
